description: Register a newly purchased vehicle at the Regional Transport Office (RTO). Handle insurance verification, road tax payment, Form 20 submission, vehicle inspection, and temporary-to-permanent registration conversion.

phases.name: Pre-Registration Verification
phases.description: Verify insurance, gather documents, check vehicle eligibility
steps: Collect dealer invoice and Form 21 (sale certificate)
Verify address proof matches across documents

phases.name: Application Submission
phases.description: Fill Form 20, calculate and pay road tax + registration fee, book RTO appointment
steps: Calculate road tax based on vehicle type and engine capacity
Submit application with all documents at RTO

phases.name: Vehicle Inspection
phases.description: Present vehicle at RTO for physical inspection
steps: Present vehicle at RTO on appointment date
RTO inspector verifies chassis number, engine number
Inspector checks vehicle against Form 22 specifications
Temporary registration issued if inspection passes

phases.name: Permanent Registration
phases.description: Wait for permanent registration number and collect RC
steps: Wait for permanent registration number assignment

valid_insurance.description: Vehicle must have valid comprehensive insurance from date of purchase

puc_certificate.description: Pollution Under Control certificate (for BS-VI vehicles, valid from manufacture date)

dealer_invoice.description: Original tax invoice from authorized dealer with GST details

form_21.description: Sale certificate issued by dealer (proof of sale)

address_proof.description: Aadhaar card / passport / utility bill as address proof

identity_proof.description: Aadhaar card / PAN card / voter ID

four_wheeler_diesel.description: Diesel car (higher tax due to emissions)

four_wheeler_ev.description: Electric vehicle (road tax exemption in most states)

fee_structure.notes: Road tax = (road_tax_pct / 100) * ex_showroom_price. Registration fee is flat per vehicle type.

insurance_expired.description: Insurance policy expired or not yet activated
insurance_expired.resolution: Get new insurance or activate existing policy

address_mismatch.description: Address on Aadhaar doesn't match address on other documents
address_mismatch.resolution: Update Aadhaar address or provide additional address proof

invoice_discrepancy.description: Dealer invoice amount doesn't match ex-showroom price (affects road tax calculation)

missing_puc.description: PUC certificate not obtained from dealer
missing_puc.resolution: Get PUC from authorized testing center

hypothecation_required.description: Vehicle purchased on loan — requires hypothecation endorsement with bank NOC
hypothecation_required.resolution: Obtain Form 34 and bank NOC for hypothecation

inspection_failure.resolution: Get dealer to correct Form 22 or resolve chassis number discrepancy

forbidden_actions: Paying road tax without correct invoice amount
Applying for permanent registration without temporary registration

timing.notes: Vehicle must be registered within 7 days of purchase. Temporary registration valid for 30 days.
